evidence: The paper applies RF variable importance (Var Imp, Min Depth, Var Hunt) and ranks genes by weighted relative frequency from the ensemble. However, substantive conclusions depend on external predictive validation: the top 5 selected genes form a composite score that correctly stratifies survival groups (log-rank p<0.001), shows clinical utility via DCA, and maintains stable C-index/Brier scores across 5-fold CV. The pseudo-variable permutation approach provides control, ensuring selected genes exceed importance of known noise. Claims focus on ensemble method effectiveness, not individual importance magnitudes."
